testcase.name: getOffer_returns200_withPremiumDetails
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-18T17:44:00.145+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.arete.webapi.controller.FormControllerTest]: FormControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-18T17:44:00.354+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.arete.webapi.AreteWebApiApplication for test class com.arete.webapi.controller.FormControllerTest

testcase.name: getOffer_returns404_whenNotFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-18T17:44:11.473+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] c.a.webapi.controller.FormController : GET /offer/nonexistent received 2026-05-18T17:44:11.485+02:00 WARN 15864 --- [ main] c.a.w.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Offer not found: No form submission found for UUID: nonexistent

testcase.name: getOffer_returns202_whenOfferNotReady
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-18T17:44:11.628+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] c.a.webapi.controller.FormController : GET /offer/not-ready received 2026-05-18T17:44:11.630+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] c.a.w.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Offer not ready, returning 202: Offer not yet computed for UUID: not-ready

testcase.name: postSaveForm_returns200_withUuid
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-18T17:44:12.662+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] c.a.webapi.controller.FormController : POST /save-form received for profile: employee

testcase.name: postSaveLeaveEmail_returns400_whenEmailIsMissing
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-18T17:44:12.799+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] c.a.webapi.controller.FormController : POST /save-leave-email received for email: 2026-05-18T17:44:12.801+02:00 WARN 15864 --- [ main] c.a.w.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Bad request: Email is required

testcase.name: postSaveLeaveEmail_returns400_whenFormDataIsMissing
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-18T17:44:12.818+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] c.a.webapi.controller.FormController : POST /save-leave-email received for email: test@example.com 2026-05-18T17:44:12.822+02:00 WARN 15864 --- [ main] c.a.w.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Bad request: Form data is required

testcase.name: postSaveLeaveEmail_returns204_onSuccess
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-18T17:44:13.075+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] c.a.webapi.controller.FormController : POST /save-leave-email received for email: test@example.com

testcase.name: postRoomCost_returns500_whenConfigIsExpired
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-18T17:44:13.336+02:00 INFO 15864 --- [ main] c.a.webapi.controller.FormController : POST /room-cost received 2026-05-18T17:44:13.338+02:00 ERROR 15864 --- [ main] c.a.w.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Room cost data expired: Room cost configuration expired on 2020-01-01. Please update the room cost data.
